strategic_direction.title: Finalize Evergreen Handoff
strategic_direction.reasoning: The March 20th live webinar is done. To maintain lead flow without manual live sessions, the EverWebinar setup and simulated chat must be bulletproofed this week.

strategic_direction.title: Activate April 'Raise Hand' Campaign
strategic_direction.reasoning: Industry data shows coaching leads respond well to 'low-friction' raising hand emails after a big event push. We need the testimonials and scripts to capitalize on the post-webinar buzz.

strategic_direction.title: Facebook Learning Phase Stabilization
strategic_direction.reasoning: Last meeting noted rising costs and the need for a 'strategic review' of learning phases. This is critical as we shift from live bursts to consistent evergreen traffic.

suggested_agenda.notes: Celebrate the successful webinar execution and ad performance optimization.
Confirm chat transcript timecodes and simulated features are ready for April launch.
Review the status of Kurt's reels and the testimonial collection needed for the 'raise hand' sequence.
Address the 5 stale items and clear the backlog of March 4th/11th tasks.

projected_roadmap.title: Lead Magnet Landing Page Audit
projected_roadmap.why_now: Since 'website' is a service gap and we are moving to evergreen, the current landing page performance will dictate the ROI of the new funnel.
projected_roadmap.impact: Higher conversion rate on evergreen traffic.

projected_roadmap.title: SMS Notification Layer for Evergreen Webinar
projected_roadmap.why_now: Evergreen models typically see a drop in attendance compared to live. SMS reminders are the industry standard to fix this.
projected_roadmap.impact: 20-30% increase in show-up rates for simulated sessions.

projected_roadmap.title: Liberty Builders Network LinkedIn Authority Campaign
projected_roadmap.why_now: The brand transition from FastPass is complete. Now we need to update the professional presence of the principals to match the new branding.
projected_roadmap.impact: Establishes long-term authority and organic reach for the coaching group.
